title: Cost Effectiveness Analysis and Finding the Best Policies to Fight COVID-19
summary: Robert Stavins: Cost Effectiveness Analysis and Finding the Best Policies to Fight COVID-19
body: Cost effectiveness analysis can play a role in finding the best policies in fighting #COVID19 , says @RobertStavins . #Coronavirus pic.twitter.com/7JGktrlA5T — Belfer Center (@BelferCenter) April 3, 2020 Recommended citation "Cost Effectiveness Analysis and Finding the Best Policies to Fight COVID-19." Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs, Harvard Kennedy School, April 3, 2020. _list.source: Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs, Harvard Kennedy School

result.main_content_en: The article highlights the application of cost-effectiveness analysis in identifying optimal policies to combat the COVID-19 pandemic. It references the perspective of Robert Stavins, suggesting that analytical frameworks typically used in environmental economics and climate policy can be valuable for public health crisis management. The core argument is that systematic evaluation of policy options based on their costs and outcomes is crucial for effective emergency response and governance during the coronavirus crisis. The piece is published by the Belfer Center, indicating a focus on evidence-based policy recommendations at the intersection of science, international affairs, and public health.
result.main_content_zh: 本文强调成本效益分析在确定抗击COVID-19最佳政策中的作用。文章引用了罗伯特·斯塔文斯的观点，认为通常用于环境经济学和气候政策的分析框架对于公共卫生危机管理具有重要价值。核心论点是，基于政策选项的成本和结果进行系统评估，对于冠状病毒危机期间的有效应急响应和治理至关重要。该文章由贝尔弗中心发布，表明其重点在于基于证据的政策建议，涉及科学、国际事务和公共卫生的交叉领域。
